title: A Catalog of Open-Source Turkish Text-to-Speech Resources (Datasets, Models, and References)
description: Descriptive-metadata catalog accompanying the literature survey "A Literature Survey on Open-Source Turkish Text-to-Speech: Datasets, Models, and Emotion" (Roxas & Bolat, 2026). It provides audited records for the surveyed scholarly works, HuggingFace speech datasets, and open-source Turkish TTS models, capturing size, sample rate, licensing findings, documentation status, architecture, and emotion support. The catalog redistributes no audio, text, or model weights: it contains descriptive metadata and pointers (repository IDs and, where applicable, full commit/revision hashes) to third-party resources hosted elsewhere. License and source notes are good-faith audited observations, not legal advice or accusations. See DATA_STATEMENT.md for methodology, provenance, scope, and caveats.
